<|grounding|>This is section B1. The document is in Congolese French. Convert the document to markdown. Dates are handwritten as day/month/year — reformat them to month/day/year (MM/DD/YYYY) in your output. If only month and year are present, output month/year (MM/YYYY). For unit designation fields (cellule/secteur, division/brigade, département/bataillon, comité/compagnie, S-comité/peloton, section), keep only the number(s) and drop the label. Examples: '11e cellule' → '11', '122e division' → '122', '2e comité' → '2', '1e < 2e section' → '1 2'.
